## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Code refactoring
- [ ] Tests

## Testing
Please describe the tests that you ran to verify your changes:

- [ ] Manual testing with Pi extension
- [ ] Unit tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Integration tests (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested with existing goals (persistence check)
- [ ] Tested goal creation, update, completion
- [ ] Tested pause/resume functionality
- [ ] Tested token budget enforcement
- [ ] Tested automatic continuation

Provide test steps or commands used:

```bash
# Example test commands
pi -e ./src/index.ts
/goal test objective
```

## Checklist

- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings
